text:
About the theme

Fonts

Playfair Display
Josefin Sans

Color

slightly off white background
Adjustable, good defaults in light and dark mode

Typographic elements

Drop Caps, small caps, printers ornaments, etc.


Inspiration

elegant news sites like The Gothamist and The Financial Times
as well as classics like Edward Tufte’s design principles

Features

Markdown Kitchen Sink
TOC and Banner
Changing Colors (a.k.a a Dark Theme)
Small Caps and Drop Caps
Listings
Citations
Analytics
